assistant_message.reasoning:
We need to categorize the finding: Modify the System Login Banner. This involves editing /etc/issue file. That's generally safe. No risk of lockout. So category safe_to_remediate. Confidence high maybe 0.97.

So false. touches_networking? No. touches_filesystems? It modifies a file on filesystem, but not a partition. It does touch filesystem. So set true for touches_filesystems.
